case_title: NICHOLAS FOSTER LAMB VS. BLACK SANDS BREWERY

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-06-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-13-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PARTIES REACHED AN AGREEMENT PRIOR TO THE CALLING OF THE CASE. IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE MARCH 13, 2018 HEARING THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. PLAINTIFF NICHOLAS FOSTER LAMB IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BLACK SANDS BREWERY IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY ROBERT ANTON PATTERSON, OWNER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DIANNE PEEBLES; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT BLACK SANDS BREWERY

FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 12/17/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE FILED BY LAMB, NICHOLAS FOSTER BLACK SANDS BREWERY

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AND MINUTES OF THE LAST HEARING, IF NO APPEARANCES AT THIS HEARING, MATTER TO BE DISMISSED W/PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P.
